summary: Data Scientist with 8+ years of experience in machine learning, deep learning, and GenAI. Expert in building end-to-end ML pipelines, RAG systems, and LLM applications. Strong background in Python, SQL, and cloud platforms. Proven track record of delivering impactful data science solutions in enterprise environments.

experience.title: Senior Consultant - Data Science
experience.description: Led a team to build GenAI solutions using Databricks Genie and LangChain. Developed RAG pipelines for enterprise knowledge management. Implemented MLOps best practices reducing model deployment time by 60%.

experience.title: Data Scientist
experience.description: Built predictive models for customer churn and demand forecasting. Developed NLP solutions for document classification. Managed end-to-end ML pipeline on AWS SageMaker.

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Implemented computer vision solutions for quality inspection. Built recommendation systems using collaborative filtering. Created data pipelines using PySpark and Airflow.

projects.name: Enterprise RAG System
projects.description: Built a production RAG system using LangChain and Pinecone for enterprise document Q&A. Handles 10K+ queries daily with 95% relevance accuracy.

projects.name: Autonomous Strategic Analysis Agent
projects.description: Multi-agent AI system for automated market research and competitive analysis using Gemini API.

projects.name: Real-time Fraud Detection
projects.description: Streaming ML pipeline for credit card fraud detection processing 100K+ transactions/minute.
